cells.rationale: The evidence state machine carries subtle identity and temporal correctness invariants whose mistakes could produce false restart success.
Durability ordering, lossless legacy conversion, and identity propagation form a cross-cutting architectural cascade with forensic correctness risks.
The multi-surface restart verdict must preserve subtle same-incarnation and monotonic-stabilization invariants across CLI, ledger, health, and real-daemon tests.
